project.title: Interacting protein identification
project.projectDescription: Identification of interacting proteins with Herpes Simplex Virus
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: Proteins were resolved on SDS-PAGE and digested by in-gel digestion with reduction / alkylation and trypsin. Peptides were desalted and analyzed by LC tandem mass spectrometry
project.dataProcessingProtocol: Data was analyzed by Maxquant and Andromeda search engine. The MS/MS raw data was searched against the Uniprot human database concatenated with Herpes Simplex Virus KOS strain fasta database.

labPIs.title: Dr
labPIs.affiliation: University of Minnesota at Twin Cities
labPIs.name: Yue Chen

references.referenceLine: Brumbaugh J, Di Stefano B, Wang X, Borkent M, Forouzmand E, Clowers KJ, Ji F, Schwarz BA, Kalocsay M, Elledge SJ, Chen Y, Sadreyev RI, Gygi SP, Hu G, Shi Y, Hochedlinger K. Nudt21 Controls Cell Fate by Connecting Alternative Polyadenylation to Chromatin Signaling. Cell. 2018 172(1-2):106-120.e21

Comment[Instrument]: Orbitrap Fusion mass spectrometer (Thermo Fischer Scientific)
Comment[AcquisitionMethod]: We used the multinotch MS3-based TMT method.
Comment[GradientTime]: a 3 hour gradient of acidic acetonitrile
